title: Camie and Pappag Reunite with the Crew
description: On pages 9–12, this part follows Unknown person #1, Zoro, Narrator, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Brook, Sanji, Fish-Men. The core story beat is camie and pappag reunite with the crew.
scene: The scene centers on camie and pappag reunite with the crew, with Unknown person #1, Zoro, Narrator, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Brook, Sanji, Fish-Men driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm so glad you're all right!! How are you feeling?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ahhh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Caimie, it's you!! I haven't seen you in forever!!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: You're even cuter than you were before!:) Caimie-chan!:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm so sorry! I meant to go out and meet you, but I got the date mixed up by a month...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Have we reached fishman Island?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We sure have!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: The Mermaids saved us all from drowning!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There's no point hiding it... all three of us were passed out until a few moments ago.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This is Caimie- Chan's House!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Here, have your hat back.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I see! Where are the others?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's the thing - it looks like we've been split up again!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I hope the others are okay!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I see...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well, I'm sure they'll pull through somehow.

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: "Bones" isn't going to be much use under the sea... but they've got "robo" and "Greenie" as well. They'll be fine.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I managed to keep track of them for a while, but it looks like us four are the only ones who washed up on the seabed.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't wait to see the others as well!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Here - I'm sure you're all freezing cold. Have some soup to warm yourselves up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ahhh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: chilled soup...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ahhhhhh!! Chilled soup isn't going to warm you up at all!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I messed UUUP!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Your clothes are dry!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't worry, Caimie- Chan!:) It's warming me up already!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They're all dry!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: what is that supposed to mean?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They're not dry yet!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They're dry, aren't they?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So what if they're dry?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, you dried out our clothes for us? Thanks! What are you, anyway?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, they're my friends.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The Medaka Mermaid QuickUplets.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm Ichika.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm Nike.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm Sanka.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm yonka two.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Come on, shouldn't that be "Goka"?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They're all fast swimmers and really well- informed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This is the girls' dorm for mermaid Cafe in the city, so I have lots of friends here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: G... Girls' Dorm?!! M - M - M - Mermaid Cafe?!!!!!!!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: That's where I'm working right now, as a waitress. There are tons of beautiful mermaids there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sanji's in Trou Uuble!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I will not fall!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He resiii ilisted!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I have sworn to myself that I will not do such shameful things as violently nosebleeding myself into unconscious- mess here on mermaid Island!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...Isn't it about time... Fate smiled on me a little...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He's sure taking this seriously.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We should head on up - I'll introduce you to my friends!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Take us up, would you, turtle-chin?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's a turtle!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yeah, a sea-turtle elevator!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This is an underwater coral apart-ment building.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm in one of the bottom- floor dorms, 'cause that's where the rent is cheapest.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The prices are highest up near the top where there's more light.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, so you're pretty poor, huh? Where are HACHi and papagg, anyway?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, well, Hacchin was injured really badly about a year ago...

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Yeah, protecting the sunny, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Men
dialogue.text: But yeah, he originally comes from the fishman district, so that's where he's been recuperating.

dialogue.speaker: New Fish-Man Pirates
dialogue.text: Fish-Man District?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Uh-huh... it's a pretty rough area, but if I'm with you guys, I suppose we could visit.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Let's go there later, then! We've gotta thank Hachi for what he did!!

dialogue.speaker: Camie
dialogue.text: ...Okay, then! And then there's pappage...

summary: Camie and Pappag Reunite with the Crew. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
